Implemented the WGSL front-end fix for `binding_array` feature gating.

Summary of changes:
- Added a new implemented enable extension: `wgpu_binding_array`.
- Added parsing support for `enable wgpu_binding_array;`.
- Added tracking for this extension in `EnableExtensions`.
- Required `wgpu_binding_array` when resolving the predeclared `binding_array` type.
- Updated existing WGSL binding-array snapshot inputs to include `enable wgpu_binding_array;`.

Validation performed:
- Confirmed the temporary regression test initially failed before the fix.
- Confirmed it passed after the fix.
- Removed the temporary regression test changes as requested.
- Ran:
  - `cargo test -p naga --test naga binding_array`
  - `cargo test -p naga front::wgsl::parse::directive::enable_extension::test_manual_variants_array_is_correct`
  - `cargo test -p naga --test naga snapshots::convert_snapshots_wgsl`

All executed tests passed.

No commits were made.
